name: Other payment date
description: Reports information about upfront and termination payments, if applicable to a transaction, and optionally for notional amount exchanges for cross-currency interest rate swaps. It is reported as an ISO 8601 date.
optionalityRules: Required for upfront payments if applicable (page 120, Condition table).
Required for termination payments if applicable (page 120, Condition table).
Optional for notional amount exchanges for cross-currency interest rate swaps (page 120, Condition table).
For any Action type for which an Other payment amount is reported, Other payment date is required (page 122, paragraph 462(e)(i)).
valueRules: If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications (page 122, paragraph 462(f)).
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types (page 122, paragraph 462(g)).
